Notice Of Hearing Of Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Apr-06-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jason Lindsay of Greenberg Traurig, LLP telephone number 310-586-3861 for Petitioner Morgan Stanley Smith Barney LLC.
No other appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court confirmed its tentative ruling. PETITIONER MORGAN STANLEY SMITH BARNEY LLC'S Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award is granted. No opposition filed. Order and separate judgment signed in open Court.
